originalTitle: The Best High-Yield Income Investments for 2026, Ranked
summary: When it comes to income, investors essentially have two choices: stocks or bonds. While the S&P 500 yields just 1%, there are plenty of pockets of the stock market where investors can snag 3%-plus dividend yields, including utilities, REITs, pipelines, and one of the most hated sectors, cable and telecom. “Yields are very attractive,” says Russ Brownback, BlackRock’s deputy chief investment officer for global fixed income and co-manager of the undefinedBlackRock Strategic Income Opportunities fund.
content: When it comes to income, investors essentially have two choices: stocks or bonds. While the S&P 500 yields just 1%, there are plenty of pockets of the stock market where investors can snag 3%-plus dividend yields, including utilities, REITs, pipelines, and one of the most hated sectors, cable and telecom. “Yields are very attractive,” says Russ Brownback, BlackRock’s deputy chief investment officer for global fixed income and co-manager of the undefinedBlackRock Strategic Income Opportunities fund.
chineseTitle: 2026 年最佳高收益投资排名
chineseSummary: 当谈到收入时，投资者基本上有两种选择：股票或债券。虽然标准普尔 500 指数的收益率仅为 1%，但股市中有很多领域投资者可以获得 3% 以上的股息收益率，包括公用事业、房地产投资信托基金、管道以及最令人讨厌的行业之一——有线电视和电信。 “收益率非常有吸引力，”贝莱德全球固定收益副首席投资官兼未定义的贝莱德战略收益机会基金联席经理拉斯·布朗巴克 (Russ Brownback) 表示。
chineseContent: 当谈到收入时，投资者基本上有两种选择：股票或债券。虽然标准普尔 500 指数的收益率仅为 1%，但股市中有很多领域投资者可以获得 3% 以上的股息收益率，包括公用事业、房地产投资信托基金、管道以及最令人讨厌的行业之一——有线电视和电信。 “收益率非常有吸引力，”贝莱德全球固定收益副首席投资官兼未定义的贝莱德战略收益机会基金联席经理拉斯·布朗巴克 (Russ Brownback) 表示。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
